headline: CB Stock Gets Lower Price Target — But Investors Are Watching What Comes Next

headline: Chubb (NYSE:CB) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Global insurance provider Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 11.9% year on year to $15.3 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $6.82 per share was 3.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
